auditors.finding: The repo already has evidence-adjacent metadata surfaces, but they remain family-specific and do not yet form a canon-safe dedicated Evidence Packets screen.
Agent attempt failed on remote compact transport before a factual report was produced, so no Rawls evidence was relied on for the contour verdict.

No substantive canon drift or verdict inflation was found. The only independent-audit blocks were process issues: a pending audit placeholder and a pre-commit closeout overclaim before verification/commit/push had been reflected in the artifacts.

evidence.fact: The route evidence capture surface is allowlisted as external_models_evidence_capture with required/allowed args limited to route_id.
api_route_evidence_capture is explicitly tagged support-only with mutates_runtime=false, affects_primary_truth=false, and action_claim_scope blocking runtime-proof interpretation.
Current route evidence action results still carry an evidence_path value shaped like a local temp path.
Diagnostics export result shaping rewrites bundle_path to basename before browser delivery.
UI renders route evidence and diagnostics support artifacts as basename-only metadata and rejects raw path display as user-facing support text.
Diagnostics export is a support artifact only, and rollout evidence capture 16 is explicitly not exposed as a normal first-pass UI action.
Live evidence capture remains out of scope for the first UI contour and requires a separate approved contour.
rollout evidence capture 16 --json is the owner surface for the 16-account field evidence packet and defines a rich scale_evidence_packet_result contract.
Screen 29 Evidence Packets is admission-required and already records the need for a bounded evidence index/packet contract.
The queued contour itself declares dependency on a bounded evidence packet/index contract.

checks.reason: Route evidence support metadata and diagnostics bundle metadata already exist in current web design surfaces.
The CLI/runtime lane already owns a rollout evidence capture packet with explicit packet status and claim scope.
No current bounded evidence index or cross-family readonly selector is established for a dedicated Evidence Packets screen.
Current route evidence shaping still includes evidence_path in packet data, even though the browser display trims it to basename.
Canon and UI readiness materials continue to block direct file truth, live evidence normal-button exposure, and proof inflation from support artifacts.
Existing metadata snippets stay admissible in their current limited places, but the dedicated Evidence Packets screen itself remains deferred pending a stricter packet/index contract.
